## Entrance to Hades

> d

# The bell suddenly becomes red hot and falls to the ground. The wraiths, as
#   if paralyzed, stop their jeering and slowly turn to face you.
> ring bell
# Pick up the candles
> take candles
# One of the matches starts to burn.
> light match
# The candles are lit. The flames flicker wildly and appear to dance. The
#   earth beneath your feet trembles, and your legs nearly buckle beneath you.
> light candles with match
# Each word of the prayer reverberates through the hall in a deafening
#   confusion.
> read book
> drop book
> drop candles
